文件中使用 ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@theme"}]," 块，而不是繁琐的 ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tailwind.config.js"}],"。"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"以下是我如何定义高端排版比例的："}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-css","children":"@theme React 组件的灵活性。"]}],"\n",["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"“最好的学习方法是构建然后分享。” ——
